summary: Tested two bug fixes: 1) Training video short URLs with YouTube OG tags - PASS (9/9 backend tests), 2) Custom card types in GET /api/congrats/templates/all/{store_id} - PASS. Backend API correctly returns custom card types alongside defaults. Frontend code correctly fetches and merges custom types when user has store_id. Note: Super admin user (forest@imosapp.com) has store_id=null, so custom types won't appear for this user - this is expected behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Training video OG tags (short_urls.py lines 884-898): Correctly extracts YouTube video ID from both youtube.com/watch?v= and youtu.be/ URLs, sets og:image to YouTube thumbnail, og:title to video_title from metadata
_wrap_video_urls (templates.py lines 115-136): Correctly stores video_title in metadata when creating short URLs for training videos
GET /api/congrats/templates/all/{store_id} (congrats_cards.py lines 323-357): Returns all 6 default types plus any custom types from congrats_templates collection
quick-send/[action].tsx (lines 84-106): Correctly fetches custom types when user.store_id exists and merges with DEFAULT_CARD_TYPES
contact/[id].tsx (lines 1513-1534, 4411, 4475): Correctly fetches custom types and spreads them into both composer card section and template picker modal

success_rate.frontend: 100% (quick-send page loads correctly, all 6 default card types visible)

seed_data_creation: Created test custom card type 'test_custom_type' with headline 'Test Custom Headline' for store 69a0b7095fddcede09591668
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Training video short URLs now include video_title in metadata and redirect serves YouTube OG tags (thumbnail + title). 2) GET /api/congrats/templates/all/{store_id} returns custom card types alongside defaults. Frontend correctly fetches and displays custom types when user has store_id. Super admin user has store_id=null so won't see custom types - this is expected. Store 69a0b7095fddcede09591668 has 2 custom card types: 'custom' (headline='Test Custom Card') and 'test_custom_type' (headline='Test Custom Headline').

training_video_og_tags.GET /api/s/{short_code} for training_vid: PASS - returns HTML with YouTube OG tags

training_video_og_tags.og:title from video_title: PASS - uses video_title from metadata or fallback

custom_card_types.Frontend quick-send page: PASS - loads correctly, shows 6 default types
